@portable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user (userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, login VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE, password VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, birthdate VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, lasttime INT(11) NOT NULL, created INT(11) NOT NULL, modified INT(11) NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_disabled (reason INT NOT NULL, userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(256), modified BIGINT NOT NULL, created BIGINT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (reason, userId), FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES user(userId) ON DELETE CASCADE)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profile (profileId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, region VARCHAR(20), locale VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, alias VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, properties LONGTEXT NOT NULL, lasttime INT(11) NOT NULL, created INT(11) NOT NULL, modified INT(11) NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES user(userId) ON DELETE CASCADE)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profile_disabled (reason INT NOT NULL, profileId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(256), modified BIGINT NOT NULL, created BIGINT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (reason, profileId), FOREIGN KEY (profileId) REFERENCES user_profile(profileId) ON DELETE CASCADE)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_email (email VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, main TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created INT(11) NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES user(userId) ON DELETE CASCADE)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pin (target VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, userId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, pin VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, token VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE, created INT(11) NOT NULL, expires INT(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (target, userId), FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES user(userId) ON DELETE CASCADE)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_profile_userId ON user_profile(userId)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_disabled_userId ON user_disabled(userId)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_disabled_modified ON user_disabled(modified)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_profile_disabled_profileId ON profile_disabled(profileId)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_email_userId ON user_email(userId)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pin_token ON pin(token)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profile_role (profileId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, created BIGINT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (profileId, code), FOREIGN KEY (profileId) REFERENCES user_profile(profileId) ON DELETE CASCADE)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_profile_membership_profileId ON profile_role(profileId)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_profile_membership_created ON profile_role(created)

get-roles-by-userid.@portable: SELECT profile_role.code FROM profile_role INNER JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.profileId = profile_role.profileId WHERE user_profile.userId = :userId ORDER BY profile_role.code ASC

get-roles-by-profileid.@portable: SELECT code FROM profile_role WHERE profileId = :profileId ORDER BY code ASC

has-role.@portable: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM profile_role INNER JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.profileId = profile_role.profileId WHERE user_profile.userId = :userId AND profile_role.code = :code

has-role-by-profileid.@portable: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM profile_role WHERE profileId = :profileId AND code = :code

assign-role-by-code.@portable: INSERT INTO profile_role (profileId, code, created) SELECT :profileId, :code, :created WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_profile WHERE user_profile.profileId = :profileId) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM profile_role WHERE profileId = :profileId AND code = :code)

remove-role-by-code.@portable: DELETE FROM profile_role WHERE profileId = :profileId AND code = :code

admin-get-profiles-by-userid.@portable: SELECT profileId, userId, region, locale, alias, properties, lasttime, created, modified FROM user_profile WHERE userId = :userId ORDER BY created ASC

admin-list-by-created.@portable:
SELECT
    user.userId,
    user.lasttime,
    user.created,
    user.modified,
    user_email.email AS 'user_email.email',
    MIN(user_profile.profileId) AS 'user_profile.profileId'
FROM user
LEFT JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN user_email ON user_email.userId = user.userId AND user_email.main = 1
WHERE (:search = '' OR user.userId = :search OR user.login = :search OR user_profile.alias LIKE '%' || :search || '%')
  AND (:code = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM profile_role
    INNER JOIN user_profile up_role ON up_role.profileId = profile_role.profileId
    WHERE up_role.userId = user.userId AND profile_role.code = :code
  ))
  AND (:disabled_reason = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM user_disabled ud_filter
    WHERE ud_filter.userId = user.userId AND ud_filter.reason = :disabled_reason
  ))
GROUP BY user.userId, user.lasttime, user.created, user.modified, user_email.email
ORDER BY user.created DESC
LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

admin-list-by-modified.@portable:
SELECT
    user.userId,
    user.lasttime,
    user.created,
    user.modified,
    user_email.email AS 'user_email.email',
    MIN(user_profile.profileId) AS 'user_profile.profileId'
FROM user
LEFT JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN user_email ON user_email.userId = user.userId AND user_email.main = 1
WHERE (:search = '' OR user.userId = :search OR user.login = :search OR user_profile.alias LIKE '%' || :search || '%')
  AND (:code = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM profile_role
    INNER JOIN user_profile up_role ON up_role.profileId = profile_role.profileId
    WHERE up_role.userId = user.userId AND profile_role.code = :code
  ))
  AND (:disabled_reason = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM user_disabled ud_filter
    WHERE ud_filter.userId = user.userId AND ud_filter.reason = :disabled_reason
  ))
GROUP BY user.userId, user.lasttime, user.created, user.modified, user_email.email
ORDER BY user.modified DESC
LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

admin-list-by-assigned-date.@portable:
SELECT
    user.userId,
    user.lasttime,
    user.created,
    user.modified,
    user_email.email AS 'user_email.email',
    MIN(user_profile.profileId) AS 'user_profile.profileId',
    COALESCE(MAX(profile_role.created), 0) AS last_assigned
FROM user
LEFT JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN user_email ON user_email.userId = user.userId AND user_email.main = 1
LEFT JOIN profile_role ON profile_role.profileId = user_profile.profileId
WHERE (:search = '' OR user.userId = :search OR user.login = :search OR user_profile.alias LIKE '%' || :search || '%')
  AND (:code = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM profile_role urf
    INNER JOIN user_profile up_role ON up_role.profileId = urf.profileId
    WHERE up_role.userId = user.userId AND urf.code = :code
  ))
  AND (:disabled_reason = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM user_disabled ud_filter
    WHERE ud_filter.userId = user.userId AND ud_filter.reason = :disabled_reason
  ))
GROUP BY user.userId, user.lasttime, user.created, user.modified, user_email.email
ORDER BY last_assigned DESC, user.created DESC
LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

admin-list-by-disabled-created-date.@portable:
SELECT
    user.userId,
    user.lasttime,
    user.created,
    user.modified,
    user_email.email AS 'user_email.email',
    MIN(user_profile.profileId) AS 'user_profile.profileId',
    COALESCE(MAX(user_disabled.created), 0) AS disabled_created_lasttime
FROM user
LEFT JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN user_email ON user_email.userId = user.userId AND user_email.main = 1
LEFT JOIN user_disabled ON user_disabled.userId = user.userId
WHERE (:search = '' OR user.userId = :search OR user.login = :search OR user_profile.alias LIKE '%' || :search || '%')
  AND (:code = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM profile_role
    INNER JOIN user_profile up_role ON up_role.profileId = profile_role.profileId
    WHERE up_role.userId = user.userId AND profile_role.code = :code
  ))
  AND (:disabled_reason = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM user_disabled ud_filter
    WHERE ud_filter.userId = user.userId AND ud_filter.reason = :disabled_reason
  ))
GROUP BY user.userId, user.lasttime, user.created, user.modified, user_email.email
ORDER BY disabled_created_lasttime DESC, user.created DESC
LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

LEFT JOIN user_email ON user_email.userId = user.userId AND user_email.main = 1

admin-profile-list-by-created.@portable:
SELECT
    user_profile.profileId AS 'user_profile.profileId',
    user_profile.userId,
    user_profile.alias AS 'user_profile.alias',
    user_profile.locale AS 'user_profile.locale',
    user_profile.region AS 'user_profile.region',
    user_profile.created,
    user_profile.modified,
    user.lasttime
FROM user_profile
INNER JOIN user ON user.userId = user_profile.userId
WHERE (:search = '' OR user_profile.profileId = :search OR user_profile.alias LIKE '%' || :search || '%' OR user.userId = :search)
  AND (:code = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM profile_role
    WHERE profile_role.profileId = user_profile.profileId AND profile_role.code = :code
  ))
  AND (:disabled_reason = '' OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM profile_disabled
    WHERE profile_disabled.profileId = user_profile.profileId AND profile_disabled.reason = :disabled_reason
  ))
ORDER BY user_profile.created DESC
LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

  ))
ORDER BY user_profile.modified DESC
LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

admin-get-disabled-by-userid.@portable: SELECT reason, description, created, modified FROM user_disabled WHERE userId = :userId ORDER BY reason ASC

admin-get-profile-disabled-by-profileid.@portable: SELECT reason, description, created, modified FROM profile_disabled WHERE profileId = :profileId ORDER BY reason ASC

upsert-disabled.@portable:
INSERT INTO user_disabled (reason, userId, description, created, modified)
VALUES (:reason, :userId, :description, :created, :modified)
ON CONFLICT (reason, userId) DO UPDATE
SET
    description = excluded.description,
    modified = excluded.modified
upsert-disabled.@mysql:
INSERT INTO user_disabled (reason, userId, description, created, modified)
VALUES (:reason, :userId, :description, :created, :modified)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
    description = VALUES(description),
    modified = VALUES(modified)

upsert-profile-disabled.@portable:
INSERT INTO profile_disabled (reason, profileId, description, created, modified)
VALUES (:reason, :profileId, :description, :created, :modified)
ON CONFLICT (reason, profileId) DO UPDATE
SET
    description = excluded.description,
    modified = excluded.modified
upsert-profile-disabled.@mysql:
INSERT INTO profile_disabled (reason, profileId, description, created, modified)
VALUES (:reason, :profileId, :description, :created, :modified)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
    description = VALUES(description),
    modified = VALUES(modified)

get-pin.@portable: SELECT pin FROM pin WHERE target = :target and userId = :userId and pin = :pin and expires > :now

get-pin-by-token.@portable: SELECT target, userId, pin FROM pin WHERE token = :token and expires > :now

delete-pin.@portable: DELETE FROM pin WHERE target = :target and userId = :userId and pin = :pin

delete-disabled.@portable: DELETE FROM user_disabled WHERE reason = :reason and userId = :userId

delete-profile-disabled.@portable: DELETE FROM profile_disabled WHERE reason = :reason and profileId = :profileId

get-by-login.@portable:
SELECT
    user.userId,
    user.password,
    user.birthdate,
    user.lasttime,
    user.created,
    user.modified,
    user_disabled.reason AS 'user_disabled.reason',
    user_disabled.description AS 'user_disabled.description',
    user_profile.profileId AS 'user_profile.profileId',
    user_profile.userId AS 'user_profile.userId',
    user_profile.alias AS 'user_profile.alias',
    user_profile.locale AS 'user_profile.locale',
    user_profile.region AS 'user_profile.region',
    user_profile.properties AS 'user_profile.properties',
    user_profile.lasttime AS 'user_profile.lasttime',
    user_profile.created AS 'user_profile.created',
    user_profile.modified AS 'user_profile.modified',
    profile_disabled.reason AS 'profile_disabled.reason',
    profile_role.code AS 'profile_role.code'
FROM user
LEFT JOIN user_disabled ON user_disabled.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN profile_disabled ON profile_disabled.profileId = user_profile.profileId
LEFT JOIN profile_role ON profile_role.profileId = user_profile.profileId
WHERE user.login = :login

get-by-userid.@portable:
SELECT
    user.userId,
    user.password,
    user.birthdate,
    user.lasttime,
    user.created,
    user.modified,
    user_disabled.reason AS 'user_disabled.reason',
    user_disabled.description AS 'user_disabled.description',
    user_profile.profileId AS 'user_profile.profileId',
    user_profile.userId AS 'user_profile.userId',
    user_profile.alias AS 'user_profile.alias',
    user_profile.locale AS 'user_profile.locale',
    user_profile.region AS 'user_profile.region',
    user_profile.properties AS 'user_profile.properties',
    user_profile.lasttime AS 'user_profile.lasttime',
    user_profile.created AS 'user_profile.created',
    user_profile.modified AS 'user_profile.modified',
    profile_disabled.reason AS 'profile_disabled.reason',
    profile_role.code AS 'profile_role.code'
FROM user
LEFT JOIN user_disabled ON user_disabled.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN user_profile ON user_profile.userId = user.userId
LEFT JOIN profile_disabled ON profile_disabled.profileId = user_profile.profileId
LEFT JOIN profile_role ON profile_role.profileId = user_profile.profileId
WHERE user.userId = :userId
ORDER BY user_profile.created ASC, profile_role.code ASC

check-exists.@portable: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE login = :login

@portable: INSERT INTO user (userId, login, password, birthdate, lasttime, created, modified) VALUES (:userId, :login, :password, :birthdate, :lasttime, :created, :modified)

INSERT INTO user_profile (profileId, userId, region, locale, alias, properties, lasttime, created, modified) VALUES (:profileId, :userId, :region, :locale, :alias, :properties, :lasttime, :created, :modified)
INSERT INTO user_email (email, userId, main, created) VALUES (:email, :userId, :main, :created)
INSERT INTO user_disabled (reason, userId, created, modified) VALUES (:reason, :userId, :created, :modified)
INSERT INTO user_disabled (reason, userId, created, modified) VALUES (:reason, :userId, :created, :modified)
INSERT INTO pin (target, userId, pin, token, created, expires) VALUES (:target, :userId, :pin, :token, :created, :expires)

insert-pin.@portable:
INSERT INTO pin (target, userId, pin, token, created, expires)
VALUES (:target, :userId, :pin, :token, :created, :expires)
ON CONFLICT (target, userId) DO UPDATE
SET
    pin = excluded.pin,
    token = excluded.token,
    created = excluded.created,
    expires = excluded.expires;
insert-pin.@mysql:
INSERT INTO pin (target, userId, pin, token, created, expires)
VALUES (:target, :userId, :pin, :token, :created, :expires)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
    pin = VALUES(pin),
    token = VALUES(token),
    created = VALUES(created),
    expires = VALUES(expires);

set-login.@portable: UPDATE user SET login = :login, modified = :modified WHERE userId = :userId

set-password.@portable: UPDATE user SET password = :password, modified = :modified WHERE userId = :userId

set-birthdate.@portable: UPDATE user SET birthdate = :birthdate, modified = :modified WHERE userId = :userId

get-profile-properties.@portable: SELECT properties FROM user_profile WHERE profileId = :profileId

update-profile.@portable: UPDATE user_profile SET alias = COALESCE(:alias, alias), region = COALESCE(:region, region), locale = COALESCE(:locale, locale), properties = :properties, modified = :modified WHERE profileId = :profileId

get-email-by-userid.@portable: SELECT user_email.email FROM user_email WHERE user_email.userId = :userId AND user_email.main = 1 LIMIT 1
